purpose: Classify the current Client-Matter go-live evidence into approval-ready, deferral-required, and blocked decision lanes for Managing Partner/System Admin review.

main_merge_baseline.allowed_claim: Client-Matter implementation and documentation baseline may be accepted as the current repo baseline.
main_merge_baseline.forbidden_claim: This does not approve production go-live, runtime readiness, or G10 final signoff.

source_package_representation.allowed_claim: The attached Client-Matter source package is substantially represented in repo planning, validators, docs, and evidence scaffolding.
source_package_representation.forbidden_claim: Representation is not the same as live production execution.

commands.result: Client-Matter OS G7-G validation passed; release readiness closeout keeps production readiness and go-live open.
G7 plan validation passed; 40 TUWs; runtime_readiness_claim open; go_live_approval_claimed false.
Law Firm OS product contract validation passed; modules 9/9, principles 9/9, invariants 7/7.

go_live_readiness_validator.reason: A real fixture with satisfied evidence references is required; current source evidence says go-live must remain blocked.

approval_ready_current_evidence.title: Accept current Client-Matter repo baseline
approval_ready_current_evidence.approval_scope: Approve the merged repo baseline as the current implementation/documentation baseline only.

approval_ready_current_evidence.title: Accept source package representation analysis
approval_ready_current_evidence.approval_scope: Approve the attached Client-Matter ERP/CRM integration package as substantially reflected in the repo planning and evidence baseline.
restrictions: Does not resolve missing go-live evidence slots.

approval_ready_current_evidence.title: Accept owner approval request scaffolding
approval_ready_current_evidence.approval_scope: Approve the request/receipt/intake structure as the correct path for collecting real owner decisions.
restrictions: Pending request cards do not count as approval.

deferral_required_before_go_live_claim.title: Owner deferral for all failed G1-G10 gate evidence
Owner deferral for all L9 stabilization criteria
Owner deferral for all blocked launch work packages
Owner deferral for all PRE-L9 phase exits

blocked_current_evidence.title: Production go-live approval
blocking_evidence: Failed gate ids are G1, G2, G3, G4, G5, G6, G7, G8, G9, G10.
Decision register has 0 valid decided rows and 0 valid deferred rows.
blocked_current_evidence.unblock_condition: Either all G1-G10 evidence slots satisfy the go-live contract or real owner deferrals are received, validated, imported, and G10 human signoff is recorded.

blocked_current_evidence.title: Final G10 launch signoff
blocking_evidence: contracts/go-live-gate-contract.json requires human signoff for G10.
Pending owner responses do not count as owner evidence.
No approval signature reference is recorded.
blocked_current_evidence.unblock_condition: Managing Partner/System Admin approval must be captured with owner identity, decision, basis, date or revisit gate, and approval signature reference.

blocked_current_evidence.title: Runtime and production readiness claim
blocked_current_evidence.unblock_condition: Run and attach the required runtime, security, DR, M365, and operations evidence referenced by the go-live gate contract.

blocked_current_evidence.title: Treat review waiver as valid review evidence
blocking_evidence: Go-live contract and launch docs state that review waiver is not valid review evidence.
blocked_current_evidence.unblock_condition: Do not use waiver as evidence; attach real review evidence or explicitly maintain no-go/deferral status.

recommended_owner_actions.action: If desired, approve CM-BASELINE-ACCEPT-2026-06-19 as baseline acceptance only.
recommended_owner_actions.output: A management approval record outside the launch decision register, or a repo-resolving signature reference.

recommended_owner_actions.action: For each deferral decision id, either provide real owner deferral evidence or leave it pending.
recommended_owner_actions.output: Filled owner response fields in the intake path, then validated receipt/import artifacts.

recommended_owner_actions.action: Keep production go-live as blocked until G1-G10, L9, and G10 signoff evidence are valid.
recommended_owner_actions.output: No-Go decision remains the correct current decision.
